description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to test with multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11) and PyTorch versions (2.1.2+cpu, 2.2.2+cpu, 2.3.1+cpu, 2.4.0+cpu) on an ubuntu-latest environment. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements-dev.txt and requirements.txt, install torch and pytest-pretty, install the package, and run tests with pytest.
